name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.11.0 -> 1.12.0): retired the legacy custom-store vocabulary on rabbit-spec's live surfaces in favour of the current rabbit-issue vocabulary (issue / bug or enhancement / rabbit-managed issue). spec.md gains Inv 7 (live surfaces carry current issue vocabulary); rabbit-spec-update SKILL.md reworded three lines (the request input is now 'a rabbit-managed issue description'; the Specific request-class row now reads 'enhancement task'; the What-You-Do-NOT-Do bullet now reads 'File bugs or enhancements'). New content guard test-bb-terminology.py scans every live surface for the retired abbreviation, phrase family, and standalone deferred-work request-class noun. Behaviour is unchanged.
